translations.es: Estoy montando la tienda de campaña.
translations.ja: テントを張っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb; 1st person singular present; part of the separable verb ‘aufbauen’ (to set up); takes a direct object.
Definite article; accusative singular neuter; determiner for ‘Zelt’ as direct object.
Common noun; neuter; accusative singular; direct object of the verb.
Separable verbal particle; completes the verb ‘aufbauen’; placed clause-final due to V2.

sentences.target: Unser Zelt steht heute direkt am See.
sentences.reading: /ˈʊnzɐ tsɛlt ʃteːt ˈhɔʏtə diˈʁɛkt am zeː/

translations.de: Unser Zelt steht heute direkt am See.
translations.ipa: /ˈʊnzɐ tsɛlt ʃteːt ˈhɔʏtə diˈʁɛkt am zeː/
translations.en: Our tent is right by the lake today.
translations.es: Hoy nuestra tienda está junto al lago.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, notre tente est juste au bord du lac.
translations.it: Oggi la nostra tenda è proprio in riva al lago.
translations.ko: 오늘 우리 텐트는 바로 호숫가에 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我们的帐篷就在湖边。
translations.yue: 我哋個帳篷今日就喺湖邊。
translations.ru: Сегодня наша палатка стоит прямо у озера.
translations.pt: Hoje nossa barraca fica bem à beira do lago.
translations.he: האוהל שלנו היום ממש על שפת האגם.
translations.vi: Hôm nay lều của chúng tôi nằm ngay bên hồ.
translations.nl: Onze tent staat vandaag direct aan het meer.
translations.uk: Сьогодні наш намет стоїть просто біля озера.
translations.hu: Ma a sátrunk közvetlenül a tó partján van.
translations.hi: आज हमारा तंबू झील के बिल्कुल पास है.
translations.pl: Dziś nasz namiot stoi tuż przy jeziorze.
translations.el: Η σκηνή μας σήμερα είναι ακριβώς δίπλα στη λίμνη.
translations.nb: Teltet vårt står i dag rett ved innsjøen.
translations.id: Hari ini tenda kami berada tepat di tepi danau.
translations.sv: Vårt tält står i dag precis vid sjön.
translations.ro: Astăzi cortul nostru este chiar lângă lac.
translations.cs: Dnes stojí náš stan přímo u jezera.
translations.da: Vores telt står i dag lige ved søen.
translations.fi: Tänään telttamme on ihan järven rannalla.
translations.ja: 今日は私たちのテントが湖のすぐそばにあります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; agrees with ‘Zelt’; nominative singular neuter.
Common noun; neuter; nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present; intransitive; describes location/position.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb; indicates time.
Degree/manner adverb; modifies ‘steht’; indicates closeness to a location.
Preposition (contraction of ‘an dem’); governs dative; introduces PP ‘am See’.
Common noun; masculine; dative singular; object of the preposition ‘am’.

sentences.target: Ich halte das Zelt kurz fest.

translations.de: Ich halte das Zelt kurz fest.
translations.en: I'm holding the tent for a moment.
translations.es: Estoy sujetando la tienda un momento.
translations.fr: Je tiens la tente un instant.
translations.it: Reggo la tenda per un attimo.
translations.pt: Estou segurando a barraca por un instante.
translations.vi: Tôi giữ cái lều một lát.
translations.nl: Ik houd de tent even vast.
translations.hi: मैं थोड़ी देर के लिए तंबू पकड़े हुए हूँ.
translations.sv: Jag håller i tältet en stund.
translations.ja: テントを少しの間押さえています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject.
Finite verb; 1st person singular present; part of separable verb ‘festhalten’; transitive; takes a direct object.
Definite article; accusative singular neuter; determiner for ‘Zelt’.
Common noun; neuter; accusative singular; direct object of the verb.
Adverb; modifies the verb; indicates short duration.
Separable verbal particle; completes the verb ‘festhalten’; intensifies the manner of holding.

sentences.target: Im Garten schlafe ich heute im Zelt.
sentences.reading: /ɪm ˈɡaʁtn̩ ˈʃlaːfə ɪç ˈhɔʏtə ɪm tsɛlt/

translations.de: Im Garten schlafe ich heute im Zelt.
translations.ipa: /ɪm ˈɡaʁtn̩ ˈʃlaːfə ɪç ˈhɔʏtə ɪm tsɛlt/
translations.en: I'm sleeping in the tent in the garden today.
translations.es: Hoy duermo en la tienda en el jardín.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, je dors dans la tente dans le jardin.
translations.it: Oggi dormo in tenda in giardino.
translations.ko: 오늘은 정원에 있는 텐트에서 잘 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天我在花园里的帐篷里睡觉。
translations.yue: 我今日喺花園入面個帳篷瞓覺。
translations.ru: Сегодня я сплю в палатке в саду.
translations.pt: Hoje vou dormir na barraca no jardim.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi ngủ trong lều ngoài vườn.
translations.ar: اليوم أنام في الخيمة في الحديقة.
translations.nl: Vandaag slaap ik in de tent in de tuin.
translations.uk: Сьогодні я сплю в наметі в саду.
translations.hu: Ma a kertben a sátorban alszom.
translations.hi: आज मैं बगीचे में तंबू में सो रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Dziś śpię w namiocie w ogrodzie.
translations.el: Σήμερα κοιμάμαι στη σκηνή στον κήπο.
translations.nb: I dag sover jeg i teltet i hagen.
translations.id: Hari ini saya tidur di tenda di kebun.
translations.sv: Idag sover jag i tältet i trädgården.
translations.ro: Astăzi dorm în cort în grădină.
translations.cs: Dnes spím ve stanu na zahradě.
translations.da: I dag sover jeg i teltet i haven.
translations.ja: 今日は庭のテントで寝ます。

tokens.explanation: Preposition (contraction of ‘in dem’); governs dative; introduces PP ‘Im Garten’.
Common noun; masculine; dative singular; object of the preposition ‘Im’.
Finite verb; 1st person singular present; intransitive; verb-first due to preposed PP (V2).
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject placed after the verb (V2 structure).
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb; indicates time.
Preposition (contraction of ‘in dem’); governs dative; introduces PP ‘im Zelt’.
Common noun; neuter; dative singular; object of the preposition ‘im’.

Je tiens la tente un instant.

Reggo la tenda per un attimo.

Dnes spím ve stanu na zahradě.
